title: Berry Delight Parfait
description: A simple layered dessert made with berries, frozen yogurt, and granola. Perfect for a quick dessert or snack.
instructions: Layer 1/2 cup frozen yogurt into a glass or parfait dish.
Add 1/2 cup mixed berries on top of the yogurt.
Sprinkle 1/4 cup granola over the berries.
Drizzle 1 tbsp honey over the granola.
Repeat the layers one more time.
Drizzle 2 tbsp almond milk over the top layer.
Add a sprinkle of vanilla extract on top.
